creator: freebsd-bugzilla@fasterix.frmug.org
text:
(In reply to Hans Petter Selasky from comment #4)
> Do you think this quirk applies to all Lexar products? It is possible to
> mask away the idProduct match and only match the idVendor.
> 
> --HPS

I'm not sure, but I don't fully understand how the quirks templates match works.

Note that the idProduct for Miroslav's 32 GB key is the same as for my 64 GB key (0xa833), so we can assume it's the same for all their Jumpstart flash keys.

Apparently Lexar has other umass products which work with different quirks already in usb_quirk.c (see CF_READER).
